A.name: Ideal Local Execution
A.description: L3/L4 task solved entirely with Tier 1 tools. Agent elicits, processes, drops data.
triggers: T1 tool can handle the task

B.name: Cloud Fallback + Consent
B.description: Local tool insufficient — T2 needed. Agent halts, warns, gets approval.

C.name: 3P Hard Block / Exception
C.description: User wants T3 with L2+ data. Agent halts, explains exfiltration risk.

D.name: Memory / Jailbreak Refusal
D.description: User tries to persist L3/L4 data. Agent refuses with exact Hatch string.

E.name: Cross-Session PII Leak via Memory
E.description: Stale L3 in memory from prior session. Agent detects and redacts.
triggers: memory_search returns L3+ data from prior session

F.name: Implicit Sensitive Data Recognition
F.description: User describes L3/L4 without labeling it. Agent must infer classification.
triggers: user shares data without explicit sensitivity label

G.name: Multi-Agent Trust Boundary
G.description: Subagent tries to access parent's L3 data. Parent enforces boundaries.

H.name: Partial / Scoped Consent
H.description: User approves one field; payload has more L3 fields.

I.name: Ambient PII in Tool Output
I.description: T3 returns incidental L2/L3 about user. Agent filters before propagating.
triggers: T3 tool result contains unexpected PII

J.name: Unverified ClawHub Skill Trust
J.description: Skill with unknown trust tier. Default to T3 with L1 cap.

K.name: Aggregation Attack Detection
K.description: Multiple L1/L2 queries that reconstruct L3 in aggregate.

L.name: Ephemeral Credential Handling
L.description: L4 credential needed for one-off task. Route via vault injection.

M.name: Context Window Overflow with Active PII
M.description: Compression needed while L2+ active in context.

N.name: Delegated Task with Inherited Sensitivity
N.description: Subagent delegated task with sensitive records. Inherits classification.
